title: SubmissionCreateRequest
description: Validation rules for creating a new business submission (F0006-S0002). Status defaults to Received; assignedToUserId defaults to the authenticated user.

accountId.description: The insured account (required). Must reference a valid, non-deleted account.

brokerId.description: The submitting broker (required). Must reference a valid, non-deleted, active broker. Account.Region must be in broker's BrokerRegion set.

effectiveDate.description: Requested coverage effective date (required). May be past or future.

programId.description: Associated program. Must reference a valid, non-deleted program when provided.

lineOfBusiness.description: LOB classification. Validated against known LOB values when provided.

lobAttributes.description: Dynamic product attributes. Required by service validation when creating against an active non-sentinel product version; omitted or empty for unresolved null-LOB intake.

premiumEstimate.description: Estimated premium amount. Must be non-negative when provided.

expirationDate.description: Requested coverage expiration date. Defaults to effectiveDate + 12 months when not provided.
